# validation-findings

- review id：`CR-YYYYMMDD-__`
- generated at：`YYYY-MM-DD`
- reviewer：`________`
- baseline：`docs/CONSISTENCY_VALIDATION.md@<commit/tag>`

> level 仅允许：`L1 / L2 / L3`
> status 仅允许：`open / fixed / accepted concern`
> 规则：`L1` 只能在 `fixed` 后关闭，不允许标记为 `accepted concern`

## findings table

| finding id | level（L1 / L2 / L3） | file | issue | impact | required action | status（open / fixed / accepted concern） | owner | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| F-001 | `L1 / L2 / L3` | `docs/...` | `问题描述` | `影响范围与严重性` | `必须动作与验收标准` | `open / fixed / accepted concern` | `姓名/角色` | `证据链接、时间戳、补充说明` |
| F-002 | `L1 / L2 / L3` | `skills/...` | `问题描述` | `影响范围与严重性` | `必须动作与验收标准` | `open / fixed / accepted concern` | `姓名/角色` | `证据链接、时间戳、补充说明` |

## closure tracking

- open count：`__`
- fixed count：`__`
- accepted concern count：`__`
- close criteria met：`yes / no`
- final decision：`通过 / 带 concern 通过 / 不通过`
- approver：`________`
- approval date：`YYYY-MM-DD`
